case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. KENNETH G ROE et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ROE, KENNETH G AN IND. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-19-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-04-2003
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-12-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON DEC-19-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT ROE, KENNETH G AN IND.
JUDGE DONDERO; CLERKS: D/BOFFI/V. MU; REPORTER: J. BRYCE, #3321 (206) MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-12-2004 VACATED. MATTER SETTLED ON THE RECORD. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROE, KENNETH G AN IND. $5,087.42 PRINCIPAL, $475.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $165.30 COSTS, $524.07 PREJUDGMENT INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,251.79, SEE SCANNED DOC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY
